FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Intervention Euphoria Fades as Bearish Momentum Resumes
tldr_points: USD/JPY reverses entire intervention-driven rally, erasing speculative gains
MOF suspected back in market as yen buying intensifies
Technical breakdown accelerates with key support levels breached
FX.excerpt: Intervention-driven rally fully unwound; bearish momentum resumes as MOF intervention speculation grows
FX.comment: Intervention rally fully unwound; bearish momentum resumes with MOF suspected back in market

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Record High Momentum Persists as Earnings Season Exceeds Expectations
tldr_points: S&P 500 maintains bullish momentum following fresh record highs
Q1 earnings season delivering upside surprises across multiple sectors
Iran geopolitical risk remains a monitored headwind but not yet price-disruptive
STOCKS.excerpt: Bullish bias intact as earnings strength overrides geopolitical premium
STOCKS.comment: Bullish on dips toward moving average support as earnings strength validates elevated valuations

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Inflows Persist Despite Regulatory Ambiguity and Security Headwinds
tldr_points: Macro tailwinds support continued upside as institutional adoption accelerates
Technical structure remains constructive with MA20 acting as dynamic support
Regulatory clarity in US expected by May provides fundamental catalyst
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC positioned for breakout as institutional flows offset regulatory and security concerns
CRYPTO.comment: MA20 support hold confirms uptrend; institutional inflows and pending regulatory clarity provide fundamental catalyst
